title: Qiyshown #7028
definition:
Kishon = "winding"

 1) a river in central Palestine; scene of the defeat of Sisera by the
    Israelites in the time of the judges and the destruction of the
    prophets of Baal by Elijah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kishon = "winding"

 1) a river in central Palestine; scene of the defeat of Sisera by the
    Israelites in the time of the judges and the destruction of the
    prophets of Baal by Elijah

    NASB:  a wadi in the plain of Megiddo
